title: Dead World
description: Every village is in crumbling ruins, the villagers are gone along with the safety they once offered. Survival rests only in what you build, leaving the world lonely and unforgiving
body:
_Once thriving villages now stand ruined, empty, and abandoned. Roads lead only to what once was. Yet the world is not empty — the same dangers haunt the night, waiting for the careless and the unprepared. There are no walls but the ones you build, no defenders but yourself. In the Dead World, you are truly on your own._

Dead World alters world generation by replacing all villages with ruined, abandoned versions. Villagers, golems, and other village-based mobs no longer spawn, removing the familiar sources of trade and defense. However, hostile mobs still appear, making survival more dangerous and unpredictable. Variations include Standard, Lush, Barren, and Ultra Barren, each offering a different level of challenge and environmental atmosphere. The result is a world that preserves Minecraft’s core gameplay while reshaping its tone, leaving every area with a lingering sense of abandonment and quiet unease.
